seo.title: Menu - Food, Cocktails and Brunch | Miss B's Coconut Club Mission Beach
seo.description: The full menu at Miss B's Coconut Club in Mission Beach, San Diego. Craft cocktails, Caribbean-inspired food, brunch plates, and more at 3704 Mission Blvd.
